messages.content: Create a cli-app folder with calculator and time app (timer, stopwatch) using only HTML, CSS, and JS. Use dark CLI theme with monospace font. Create: index.html, css/styles.css, js/calculator.js, js/timer.js, js/stopwatch.js, js/app.js. Make it look like a terminal.

Create a cli-app folder with calculator and time app (timer, stopwatch) using only HTML, CSS, and JS. Use dark CLI theme with monospace font. Create: index.html, css/styles.css, js/calculator.js, js/timer.js, js/stopwatch.js, js/app.js. Make it look like a terminal.

name: mkdir params: path="cli-app" name: mkdir params: path="cli-app/calculator" name: mkdir params: path="cli-app/time" name: mkdir params: path="cli-app/css" name: mkdir params: path="cli-app/js" name: touch params: path="/cli-app/index.html" name: write params: path="/cli-app/index.html" content="
" name: write params: path="/cli-app/css/styles.css" content=" body { background-color: #333; color: #fff; font-family: Monaco, monospace; } #terminal { padding: 10px; width: 100%; border-bottom: 1px solid #555; } code { white-space: pre-wrap; background-color: #444; color: #fff; border-radius: 5px; } " name: write params: path="/cli-app/js/app.js" content=" class Terminal { constructor() { this.terminal = document.getElementById('terminal'); } render(message) { this.terminal.innerHTML += message + '\n'; } } const calculator = new Calculator(); const timer = new Timer(); const stopwatch = new Stopwatch(); document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { const terminal = new Terminal(); console.log('Welcome to the CLI app!'); // Add event listeners for calculator and time apps document.getElementById('calculator').addEventListener('click', () => { calculator.render('Press enter to exit...'); }); document.getElementById('timer').addEventListener('click', () => { timer.render('Press enter to stop...'); }); document.getElementById('stopwatch').addEventListener('click', () => { stopwatch.render('Press enter to reset...'); }); }); " name: write params: path="/cli-app/js/calculator.js" content=" class Calculator { constructor() {} render(message) { console.log(message); } } " name: write params: path="/cli-app/js/timer.js" content=" class Timer { constructor() { this.start = null; } render(message) { console.log(message); } startTimer() { this.start = Date.now(); } stopTimer() { const elapsed = (Date.now() - this.start) / 1000; console.log(`Time elapsed: ${elapsed.toFixed(2)} seconds`); this.start = null; } } " name: write params: path="/cli-app/js/stopwatch.js" content=" class Stopwatch { constructor() { this.start = null; } render(message) { console.log(message); } startStopwatch() { this.start = Date.now(); } lap() { const elapsed = (Date.now() - this.start) / 1000; console.log(`Lap time: ${elapsed.toFixed(2)} seconds`); } } " name: write params: path="/cli-app/js/app.js" content=" class TerminalApp { constructor() { this.terminal = document.getElementById('terminal'); this.calculatorButton = document.getElementById('calculator'); this.timerButton = document.getElementById('timer'); this.stopwatchButton = document.getElementById('stopwatch'); } render(message) { this.terminal.innerHTML += message + '\n'; } } "
